description_long: This is a traditional broom with a long, straight wooden handle and a compact, conical bundle of natural bristles at the base. The handle is slender and tapers slightly, with a smooth, unadorned finish, and appears to be made from a single piece of wood. The bristle section is tightly bound with two visible bands, giving it a classic, hand-crafted appearance. The bristles are arranged in a dense, fanned-out pattern, forming a wide sweeping surface at the bottom. The overall color is a warm, natural wood tone, with the bristles slightly lighter than the handle. There are no visible brand markings, decorative elements, or signs of wear on any part of the broom.
description: A classic wooden broom with a long, straight handle and a tightly bound, fanned bristle base in natural wood tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the fanned bristle base and the straight, vertical handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the bristle bundle and the slim handle.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the broad bristle spread and the handle's alignment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim bristle profile and the straight handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, round wooden handle with a smooth finish and no visible grip enhancements or end caps.
attribute_bristle_arrangement: Bristles are densely packed, fanned out at the base, and bound with two visible bands; bristles appear uniform in length and color.
attribute_mounting_position: Designed to be stored vertically, likely hung by the handle or leaned against a surface; no dedicated mounting feature visible.
